# Scenario Results

| Scenario | Claim Class | Excess W | Uncertainty W | SNR | Signal Margin | Nuclear Evidence | Independent Replication | Public Claim Gate | Final Status |
|---|---|---:|---:|---:|---|---|---|---|---|
| S1_Baseline_Noise | Artifact check | 0.08 | 0.22 | 0.36 | Fail | Pass | Fail | Fail | Negative |
| S2_Small_Heat_No_Replication | Excess heat | 1.30 | 0.35 | 3.71 | Pass | Pass | Fail | Fail | Inconclusive |
| S3_Heat_No_Nuclear | Excess heat | 2.20 | 0.40 | 5.50 | Pass | Fail | Fail | Fail | Negative |
| S4_Rate_Enhancement_Replicated | Rate enhancement | 0.90 | 0.25 | 3.60 | Pass | Pass | Pass | Pass | Replicated positive |
| S5_Net_Energy_Claim_Replicated | Net energy gain | 5.00 | 0.80 | 6.25 | Pass | Pass | Pass | Pass | Replicated positive |
| S6_Net_Energy_No_Replication | Net energy gain | 4.20 | 0.90 | 4.67 | Pass | Pass | Fail | Fail | Inconclusive |
| S7_Rate_Enhancement_Weak_Margin | Rate enhancement | 0.40 | 0.20 | 2.00 | Fail | Pass | Pass | Pass | Negative |
| S8_Artifact_Replicated_Noise | Artifact check | 0.15 | 0.15 | 1.00 | Fail | Pass | Pass | Pass | Negative |
| S9_Excess_Heat_High_SNR_Replicated | Excess heat | 3.10 | 0.45 | 6.89 | Pass | Pass | Pass | Pass | Replicated positive |
| S10_Excess_Heat_Borderline | Excess heat | 1.01 | 0.50 | 2.02 | Pass | Pass | Fail | Fail | Inconclusive |
| S11_Net_Energy_Missing_Nuclear | Net energy gain | 6.00 | 1.00 | 6.00 | Pass | Fail | Pass | Pass | Negative |
| S12_Rate_Enhancement_Not_Replicated | Rate enhancement | 1.20 | 0.30 | 4.00 | Pass | Pass | Fail | Fail | Inconclusive |
| S13_Artifact_False_Positive_Check | Artifact check | 0.65 | 0.25 | 2.60 | Pass | Pass | Fail | Fail | Inconclusive |
| S14_Excess_Heat_Replicated_Low_SNR | Excess heat | 1.60 | 0.90 | 1.78 | Pass | Pass | Pass | Pass | Replicated positive |
| S15_Net_Energy_Strong_All_Gates | Net energy gain | 8.00 | 0.70 | 11.43 | Pass | Pass | Pass | Pass | Replicated positive |

## Notes

- `Public Claim Gate` is locked to independent replication.
- For `Excess heat` and `Net energy gain`, nuclear evidence is required.
